---
mode: agent
description: Create a new product page component following The Daily Harvest conventions
---

Create a new React component for The Daily Harvest eCommerce app.

Requirements:
- Use functional component with TypeScript
- Import and use `Header` and `Footer` wrapper components
- Use the `.app`, `.main-content` CSS structure
- Add Framer Motion `motion.div` wrappers for entrance animations
- Use CSS custom properties from `index.css` (e.g., `var(--color-accent)`)
- Use native `<dialog>` for any modal interactions
- Include `aria-labelledby` on dialog elements
- Ensure all interactive elements have proper `aria-label` attributes
- No inline styles except for dynamic values
